purpose: development noisy-reference pilot; not confirmatory or frozen

reference_convention.decision: first global stride-grid decision at or after probe end
reference_convention.reference: healthy calibration mean/scale conditioned on task, probe, W, and decision lag; no matched fault-minus-healthy input
reference_convention.distance: dimension-normalized diagonal-Mahalanobis distance on retained cosine/sine coefficients
reference_convention.attribution: nearest calibration fault-shape centroid; pilot instrument only

recommendation.decision: ADVANCE SETTING FOR REFERENCE-RUNG IMPLEMENTATION REVIEW
recommendation.reason: This suite-S setting cleared the predeclared development false-alarm and per-fault detection screens across every tested onset alignment and ranked highest on worst-alignment prototype attribution. It remains a pilot choice, not a frozen configuration or headline result.
